content.text:
Here are several reputable med spas in **Katy, Texas** that offer **radiofrequency microneedling (RF microneedling)** services — also known as RF microneedling, Morpheus8, PiXel8, Secret RF, and similar treatments. I’ve included key details about each provider to help you compare offerings:

---

**Soo Med Spa (Katy, TX)**  
- Offers **RF microneedling with Morpheus8**—a powerful combination of microneedling and RF energy targeting deeper skin layers to improve texture, laxity, scars, and wrinkles([soomedspa.com](https://soomedspa.com/services/rf-microneedling.html?utm_source=openai)).  
- Promotes long-lasting results with collagen remodeling that continues for **3–6 months** and may last **1–2 years**([soomedspa.com](https://soomedspa.com/services/rf-microneedling.html?utm_source=openai)).  
- Treatment process includes consultation, numbing cream, and the procedure itself (45–90 minutes), with recovery typically involving **3–7 days of mild redness or swelling**([soomedspa.com](https://soomedspa.com/services/rf-microneedling.html?utm_source=openai)).

**Ageless Med Spa (Katy, TX)**  
- Provides general **RF microneedling**, merging microneedling with RF energy to rejuvenate and tighten skin([agelessmedspakaty.com](https://agelessmedspakaty.com/rf-microneedling/?utm_source=openai)).  
- Highlights benefits such as improved texture, elasticity, reduced fine lines, wrinkles, and acne scars, with minimal downtime([agelessmedspakaty.com](https://agelessmedspakaty.com/rf-microneedling/?utm_source=openai)).  
- Emphasizes an experienced, personalized approach with skilled practitioners([agelessmedspakaty.com](https://agelessmedspakaty.com/rf-microneedling/?utm_source=openai)).

**About Face & Body Medical Spa (Katy, TX)**  
- Features **PiXel8 RF microneedling**, which uses adjustable RF energy for tailored treatments([aboutfaceandbodykaty.com](https://aboutfaceandbodykaty.com/services/skin-treatments/pixel8-rf-microneedling-katy-tx?utm_source=openai)).  
- Benefits include brighter tone, smoother texture, collagen and elastin stimulation, and long-lasting improvements([aboutfaceandbodykaty.com](https://aboutfaceandbodykaty.com/services/skin-treatments/pixel8-rf-microneedling-katy-tx?utm_source=openai)).  
- Typically recommends **3–4 sessions** spaced about one month apart, with gradual results and very minimal downtime([aboutfaceandbodykaty.com](https://aboutfaceandbodykaty.com/services/skin-treatments/pixel8-rf-microneedling-katy-tx?utm_source=openai)).

**Aesthetic Master Infusions LLC (Katy, TX)**  
- Offers general **RF microneedling** that penetrates deeper than traditional microneedling for enhanced rejuvenation([aestheticmasterinfusions.com](https://www.aestheticmasterinfusions.com/rf-microneedling?utm_source=openai)).  
- Aims to boost collagen/elastin, reduce wrinkles and scars, tighten skin, and improve texture and tone, with minimal downtime([aestheticmasterinfusions.com](https://www.aestheticmasterinfusions.com/rf-microneedling?utm_source=openai)).

**Aesthetica MD Med Spa (Cypress/Katy area)**  
- Provides **Morpheus8 RF microneedling**, targeting deeper skin layers to stimulate collagen, reduce fat, and firm up the skin([aestheticamdcypress.com](https://aestheticamdcypress.com/services/morpheus8-in-katy-tx/?utm_source=openai)).  
- Ideal for various areas from the face to larger body parts; suitable for different skin types([aestheticamdcypress.com](https://aestheticamdcypress.com/services/morpheus8-in-katy-tx/?utm_source=openai)).

**Progressive Women’s Care (Katy, TX)**  
- Offers **Morpheus8**, focusing on subdermal remodeling of skin and fat to tighten and smooth skin without surgery([myobgynofkaty.com](https://www.myobgynofkaty.com/aesthetics-services/body-rejuvenation/morpheus-8/?utm_source=openai)).  
- Typically recommends **three treatments, about four weeks apart**, with visible effects within weeks and ongoing improvements for months([myobgynofkaty.com](https://www.myobgynofkaty.com/aesthetics-services/body-rejuvenation/morpheus-8/?utm_source=openai)).

**Glow Up MD Spa (Katy, TX)**  
- Led by board-certified Dr. Angie Kim, this clinic offers RF microneedling to treat acne scars, wrinkles, hyperpigmentation, uneven tone/texture, and more([glowupmdspa.com](https://glowupmdspa.com/services/rf-microneedling/?utm_source=openai)).  
- Sessions typically last 30–60 minutes with minimal discomfort and downtime; usually **3–4 treatments spaced 4–6 weeks apart** for optimal results([glowupmdspa.com](https://glowupmdspa.com/services/rf-microneedling/?utm_source=openai)).

**Lush RX Med Spa (Houston area, serving Katy)**  
- Delivers RF microneedling designed to gently stimulate collagen and improve texture, tone, and various skin concerns([lushrx.com](https://www.lushrx.com/rf-microneedling-katy-tx?utm_source=openai)).  
- Customizable treatments, minimal downtime, and the option to combine with PRP (“Vampire Facial”) for enhanced results([lushrx.com](https://www.lushrx.com/rf-microneedling-katy-tx?utm_source=openai)).

**Beauty Becomes You Med Spa (Katy/Sugar Land area)**  
- Offers **Secret RF**, a fractional RF microneedling treatment combining thermal energy and microneedling to improve skin texture, scars, wrinkles, and stretch marks([beautybecomesyou.com](https://www.beautybecomesyou.com/med-spa/skin-rejuvenation/secret-rf?utm_source=openai)).  
- Suitable for all skin types and various body areas([beautybecomesyou.com](https://www.beautybecomesyou.com/med-spa/skin-rejuvenation/secret-rf?utm_source=openai)).

---

** Summary Comparison**:

| Provider | RF Device / Brand | Key Highlights |
|---------|-------------------|----------------|
| Soo Med Spa | Morpheus8 | Deep collagen remodeling, long-lasting results (3–6 mo, up to 2 yrs) |
| Ageless Med Spa | Generic RF Microneedling | Skilled practitioners, minimal downtime |
| About Face & Body | PiXel8 | Adjustable RF energy, 3–4 sessions, gradual enhancements |
| Aesthetic Master Infusions | Generic RF | Broad rejuvenation (face/body), minimal downtime |
| Aesthetica MD | Morpheus8 | Targets deep layers, can reduce fat, firm skin |
| Progressive Women’s Care | Morpheus8 | Subdermal remodeling, suitable for body areas |
| Glow Up MD | Generic RF | Board-certified MD, tailored skin concerns |
| Lush RX | Generic RF (PRP optional) | Customizable, combine with PRP |
| Beauty Becomes You | Secret RF | Fractional RF, good for scars and texture |

---

 **How to Choose**:

- Prefer a specific technology like **Morpheus8**, **PiXel8**, or **Secret RF**? Providers offering that device may be your top choice (e.g., Soo Med Spa for Morpheus8, About Face & Body for PiXel8, Beauty Becomes You for Secret RF).
- Seeking a **medical doctor–led** facility? Consider **Glow Up MD**.
- Looking for **minimal downtime** and customizable approaches? **Lush RX**, **About Face & Body**, and **Ageless Med Spa** are strong candidates.
- Want to address **body areas or fat reduction** along with skin tightening? **Aesthetica MD** and **Progressive Women’s Care** offer those options.

---

** Next Steps**:

1. **Contact your top choices** to inquire about pricing, availability, and a complimentary consultation.
2. **Ask about pre-treatment preparation** (e.g., avoiding retinoids/sun exposure) and post-treatment care.
3. **Review before-and-after photos**, ask about experience treating your specific concerns, and read patient reviews.
4. Consider booking consultations to compare comfort level, environment, and practitioner expertise in person.

Let me know if you'd like help contacting any of these clinics, reviewing costs, or scheduling a consultation!
